items.title: A Look At Sherwin-Williams (SHW) Valuation After Q4 Earnings Beat And Expansion Plans
items.description: Sherwin-Williams (SHW) has been back in focus after its Q4 2025 earnings topped Wall Street forecasts on revenue and adjusted EPS, alongside plans for 80 to 100 new stores in 2026. See our latest analysis for Sherwin-Williams. That earnings beat and store expansion plan arrived on top of a 6.18% 90 day share price return and a 10.60% year to date share price return. The 3 year total shareholder return of 62.71% points to momentum that has been building over a longer stretch. If...
